tests.test_name: Filename reflects role and source file (no add-ons) -- Product Owner, auth.feature, , Documentation, shiftdoc-po-auth.md
tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)
tests.description: When a Product Owner uploads a file and runs analysis without any add-ons, the downloaded results file is named using the role abbreviation and source filename.

test_coverage.verification_step: Role and source reflected in filename
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The downloaded Markdown file is named 'shiftdoc-po-auth.md', correctly encoding the Product Owner role and the uploaded file name
The output panel displays the 'Documentation' heading after analysis completes

tests.test_name: Filename reflects role and source file (no add-ons) -- QA Manager, auth.feature, , Documentation, shiftdoc-qam-auth.md
tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)
tests.description: When a QA Manager uploads a file and runs analysis without any add-ons, the downloaded results file is named using the QA Manager role abbreviation and source filename.

test_coverage.verification_step: Role and source reflected in filename
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The downloaded Markdown file is named 'shiftdoc-qam-auth.md', correctly encoding the QA Manager role and the uploaded file name
The output panel displays the 'Documentation' heading after analysis completes

tests.test_name: Filename reflects role and source file (no add-ons) -- Product Owner, checkout_flow.feature, , Documentation, shiftdoc-po-checkout_flow.md
tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)
tests.description: When a Product Owner uploads a differently named file and runs analysis without add-ons, the downloaded file name correctly reflects that source filename.

test_coverage.verification_step: Source filename preserved in download name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The downloaded Markdown file is named 'shiftdoc-po-checkout_flow.md', confirming the filename segment changes with the uploaded source file
The output panel displays the 'Documentation' heading after analysis completes

tests.test_name: Filename reflects role and source file (no add-ons) -- Product Owner, login.spec.ts, , Documentation, shiftdoc-po-login.md
tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)
tests.description: When a non-.feature file (TypeScript spec) is uploaded, the downloaded results file name uses only the base name without the original extension.

test_coverage.verification_step: Non-feature file extension stripped from download name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The downloaded Markdown file is named 'shiftdoc-po-login.md', confirming the .spec.ts extension is dropped and only the base name is used
The output panel displays the 'Documentation' heading after analysis completes

tests.test_name: Filename appends add-on short codes -- Product Owner, auth.feature, Technical Review, Documentation and Analysis, shiftdoc-po-auth+tr.md
tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)
tests.description: When a single add-on is selected alongside the analysis, the downloaded filename includes the add-on's short code appended after the source name.

test_coverage.verification_step: Single add-on short code appended to filename
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The downloaded file is named 'shiftdoc-po-auth+tr.md', confirming the Technical Review add-on is encoded as '+tr'
The output panel heading changes to 'Documentation and Analysis' when add-ons are included

tests.test_name: Filename appends add-on short codes -- QA Manager, auth.feature, Technical Review, Gap Analysis, Risk Assessment, Documentation and Analysis, shiftdoc-qam-auth+tr+gap+risk.md

parameters.add_ons: Technical Review, Gap Analysis, Risk Assessment

tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)
tests.description: When three add-ons are selected, the downloaded filename includes all three add-on short codes in order after the source name.

test_coverage.verification_step: Multiple add-on short codes appended to filename
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The downloaded file is named 'shiftdoc-qam-auth+tr+gap+risk.md', confirming all three add-ons are encoded in sequence
The output panel heading shows 'Documentation and Analysis' when multiple add-ons are selected

tests.test_name: Filename appends add-on short codes -- QA Manager, auth.feature, Technical Review, Gap Analysis, Annotation Summary, Risk Assessment, Recommendations, Documentation and Analysis, shiftdoc-qam-auth+tr+gap+ann+risk+rec.md

parameters.add_ons: Technical Review, Gap Analysis, Annotation Summary, Risk Assessment, Recommendations

tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)
tests.description: When the maximum set of five add-ons is selected, all five short codes are appended to the downloaded filename in the correct order.

test_coverage.verification_step: All five add-on short codes appended to filename
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The downloaded file is named 'shiftdoc-qam-auth+tr+gap+ann+risk+rec.md', confirming all five add-ons are encoded correctly in sequence
The output panel heading shows 'Documentation and Analysis' with the full add-on set selected

tests.test_name: Pasted text with no filename falls back to date-time
tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)
tests.description: When a user pastes test content directly instead of uploading a file, the downloaded filename uses a date-time stamp in place of a source filename.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The downloaded file name follows the pattern 'shiftdoc-po-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.md', confirming a timestamp is used when no source file is available
The output panel shows the generated documentation after pasted content is analysed

tests.test_name: Pasted text with add-ons falls back to date-time with add-on suffix
tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)
tests.description: When a user pastes test content and selects add-ons, the downloaded filename combines a date-time stamp with the add-on short codes.

test_coverage.verification_step: Date-time fallback with add-on short codes in filename
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The downloaded file name follows the pattern 'shiftdoc-po-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS+tr+gap.md', confirming both the timestamp fallback and add-on encoding work together

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation and analysis visible in output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output panel shows documentation and analysis content after pasted content with add-ons is analysed

tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)
tests.description: When the user downloads results as Markdown, the file is saved with a .md extension.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The downloaded file is named 'shiftdoc-po-auth.md', confirming the correct .md extension is applied for Markdown downloads

tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)
tests.description: When the user downloads results as HTML, the file is saved with a .html extension.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The downloaded file is named 'shiftdoc-po-auth.html', confirming the correct .html extension is applied for HTML downloads

tests.feature: Download Analysis Results - Filename and Format (Mocked)
tests.description: When the user downloads results as JSON, the file is saved with a .json extension.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The downloaded file is named 'shiftdoc-po-auth.json', confirming the correct .json extension is applied for JSON downloads
